feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Issue with SQL Query Result Differ From Manual Table Execution - EKPO & EKBE
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I’m facing an issue with a SQL query in an ABAP report that uses a JOIN and a SUM aggregation.

Example Scenario:

For a specific matnr (material number) and werks (plant), along with the other conditions, the expected SUM of quantity is 30. But the query during execution returns 120.

Problem:

When I manually pass the inputs in table level I get the correct result. However, when the same inputs are passed in query and is executed during runtime with the values passed through variables, it returns incorrect results.

Strangely, this issue occurs only in the PRD system – in DEV, it works as expected.

Here is the query I’m using:

SELECT SUM( CASE  WHEN _ekbe~shkzg = 'H'
                          THEN _ekbe~menge * ( -1 )
                          ELSE  _ekbe~menge
                   END )
       FROM ekpo AS _ekpo
       INNER JOIN ekbe AS _ekbe
         ON _ekbe~matnr EQ _ekpo~matnr
         AND _ekbe~ebeln EQ _ekpo~ebeln
         AND _ekbe~bwart IS NOT INITIAL
       WHERE _ekpo~matnr = @meprnitem-matnr
       AND _ekpo~werks = @meprnitem-werks
       AND _ekpo~elikz IS INITIAL
       AND _ekpo~loekz IS INITIAL
       INTO @LV_quant_ekbe.

entry.title: S4/Hana Custom Code Check question regarding Material fieldlength extension
entry.content:
Hello,

we have several own RFC's. The ATC-Check complains "Type component ... used by RFC-Function parameter - The parameter type of a RFC-Function is a structure where one component has an extended type. Problems can occur if this function is called."

How can I exacly comment this Message out ( Pseudocomment "#EC CI_FLDEXT_OK[2215424] does not work, di do it like this:

FUNCTION z_ws_delivery_update. "#EC CI_FLDEXT_OK[2215424]
*"----------------------------------------------------------------------
*"*"Globale Schnittstelle:
*"  IMPORTING
*"     VALUE(VBKOK_WA) LIKE  VBKOK STRUCTURE  VBKOK

entry.title: ABAP2XLSX demo programs
entry.content:
Experts,

I am trying to install ABAP2XLSX demo programs in a local package. I am getting an error while trying to activate the programs. 

TYPE ZCL_EXCEL is unknown.

I have attached the error screenshot. I followed the steps in this link to setup ABAP GIT standalone program. 
Can you please let me know if I missed any step which is causing the issue. 

Thanks

Bharath

entry.title: Add validation to the "Switch between Display and Change" button in BP T-code.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have implemented the BADI BUPA_LOCK to display an error message if an attachment does not exist for a Business Partner (BP) customer in the S/4HANA system. I would like your input on whether this is the correct and recommended approach, or if there is a better way to fulfill this requirement.

Requirement:

In S/4HANA, during the use of Transaction Code BP, if a Business Partner (BP) customer does not have any attachments, the system should display an error message to the user.

When the user clicks on "Switch between Display and Change" button in BP T-code, the system should check for attachment. If none are found, an error message should be displayed. Screenshots are attached below. If attachment exists, then system will allow to make changes in BP.

In ECC, similar requirement was handled in program SAPMF02D (Transaction Code XD02). SAPMF02D is obsoleted in S/4 HANA (SAP Note Ref -2606686) . 

Implementation Details:

  • BADI Used: BUPA_LOCK
  • Interface: IF_EX_BUPA_LOCK
  • Implementing Class: ZCL_IM_MDS_BUPA_LOCK
  • Method Implemented: IF_EX_BUPA_LOCK~LOCK

Test Case:

  • Business Partner: 295
  • Customer Number: 44
  • Scenario: No attachments currently exist.

Currently it is successfully fulfilling the business requirement.

My Question:

While the current implementation works as expected, I wanted to make sure if using BUPA_LOCK is the right place to perform this kind of validation.

  • Is this BADI intended for such validations?
  • Could there be a more suitable enhancement point or BADI for checking attachments in the BP transaction?
  • Are there any potential issues or risks with using BUPA_LOCK for this purpose?

Any guidance, recommendations, or best practices you can share would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

Attached the screenshots for reference.

entry.title: Add validation to the "Switch between Display and Change" button in BP T-code.
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have implemented the BADI BUPA_LOCK to display an error message if an attachment does not exist for a Business Partner (BP) customer in the S/4HANA system. I would like your input on whether this is the correct and recommended approach, or if there is a better way to fulfill this requirement.

Requirement:

In S/4HANA, during the use of Transaction Code BP, if a Business Partner (BP) customer does not have any attachments, the system should display an error message to the user.

When the user clicks on "Switch between Display and Change" button in BP T-code, the system should check for attachment. If none are found, an error message should be displayed. Screenshots are attached below. If attachment exists, then system will allow to make changes in BP.

In ECC, similar requirement was handled in program SAPMF02D (Transaction Code XD02). SAPMF02D is obsoleted in S/4 HANA (SAP Note Ref -2606686) . 

Implementation Details:

  • BADI Used: BUPA_LOCK
  • Interface: IF_EX_BUPA_LOCK
  • Implementing Class: ZCL_IM_MDS_BUPA_LOCK
  • Method Implemented: IF_EX_BUPA_LOCK~LOCK

Test Case:

  • Business Partner: 295
  • Customer Number: 44
  • Scenario: No attachments currently exist.

Currently it is successfully fulfilling the business requirement.

My Question:

While the current implementation works as expected, I wanted to make sure if using BUPA_LOCK is the right place to perform this kind of validation.

  • Is this BADI intended for such validations?
  • Could there be a more suitable enhancement point or BADI for checking attachments in the BP transaction?
  • Are there any potential issues or risks with using BUPA_LOCK for this purpose?

Any guidance, recommendations, or best practices you can share would be greatly appreciated. Thank you in advance!

Attached the screenshots for reference.

entry.title: Insert operations of standard network into a network
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I want to insert operations of a standard network into a network.  In the transcation cj20n  You have the opportunity to insert a standard network. But how can I solve this with ABAP code? I couldn't find a function module for it. 

The function modules does not solve my problem. Maybe I used it wrong.

CO_SD_INSERT_LIBRARY_NETW

CO_BT_AFVG_READ_WITH_LOGKEY

entry.title: Unable to create "Switch-Based Feature Toggles"
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community!

I am currently investigating Switch-Based Feature Toggles.

However, I am unable to create the "Feature Toggle" development object using these steps in either an S/4HANA on-premise system or in the SAP Trial BTP Account ABAP Environment Training system (TRL). In Eclipse ADT, I receive the following error message: "No authorization to create objects of this object type in the selected project." This happens even when using SAP_ALL authorization.

 

I have two questions:

  1. What are the prerequisites to create a "Feature Toggle" object?
  2. Is the "Switch-Based Feature Toggles" the same as the "Switch Framework" (transactions SFW1, ..., SFW5), with the only difference being that one is used in Eclipse ADT and the other in the SAP GUI? Then why it is not available in BTP ABAP Environment? "Feature Toggle" lies below "Switch Framework" in Eclipse create screen:

 

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Ignats

entry.title: Consuming a Third-Party SOAP Web Service in SAP Public Cloud via RAP
entry.content:
Dear All,

I hope this message finds you well.

In an SAP Public Cloud system, I am trying to consume a third-party SOAP web service using the RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming Model) framework.

While creating the destination, we encountered an error when providing the service URL directly.

I would like to understand the correct approach to follow if I were to use a Communication Scenario instead.

Unfortunately, I couldn't find any relevant resources on this topic. If anyone has experience with a similar case, your support would be highly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

Best regards.

entry.title: Deletion of Texts using BAPI_WRF_LAYMOD_SAVEREPLICA
entry.content:
Hello experts

In BAPI_WRF_LAYMOD_SAVEREPLICA, I wanted to delete layout module texts; there is a requirement that texts in certain languages are deleted. If I specify the elements that I want to delete in the interface DESCRIPTIONS with the deletion indicator FUNCTION = 003 and specify the corresponding layout module LAYOUT_MODULE with the deletion indicator FUNCTION = 004, it does not work.

Is there anything to consider when deleting sub-elements of a layout module?

Thank you very much for your advice and support

Best regards
Kurt

entry.title: Implementing nested line items in a Fiori application using RAP.
entry.content:
Hello expert,

We are developing a custom Fiori application for SAP Public Cloud. The requirement is to generate a nested line item at runtime. Based on the user's input number, the corresponding sub-line items should be dynamically displayed on the same screen.

Does anyone have an idea about how to develop this type of requirement or implementation ?

entry.title: Program for KSB1 to run multiple variants together
entry.content:
Hi All

I am trying to write a wrapper program for KSB1 however I don't see any data after I execute the program. If I run KSB1 directly with the same variant I see the data. I want to run multiple variants together & save all the files separately on the given path preferably in xlsx format or csv/xls format. If this works I will add option to save files in either xlsx or pdf & then later on I will add option to send files via email through background job. I m functional consultant & learning ABAP.

 

TABLES: varid.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_variant,
         name TYPE raldb_vari,
       END OF ty_variant.

TYPES: ty_line255 TYPE c LENGTH 255.

DATA: lt_variant  TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_variant,
      ls_variant  TYPE ty_variant,
      lt_list     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF abaplist,
      lt_text     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF ty_line255 WITH DEFAULT KEY,
      lv_fullpath TYPE string,
      lv_count    TYPE i.

SELECTION-SCREEN BEGIN OF BLOCK b1 WITH FRAME TITLE text-001.
SELECT-OPTIONS: s_varnt FOR varid-variant.
PARAMETERS: p_path TYPE rlgrap-filename OBLIGATORY.
SELECTION-SCREEN END OF BLOCK b1.

* Text-001 = 'KSB1 Wrapper - Multiple Variants to Local Excel'

START-OF-SELECTION.

  " Ensure program runs only in foreground
  IF sy-batch = 'X'.
    MESSAGE 'Program cannot run in background. Please run in foreground.' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  " Get list of variants for report RKAEP000 (not RKSB0100)
  SELECT variant AS name
    INTO TABLE lt_variant
    FROM varid
    WHERE report = 'RKAEP000'
      AND variant IN s_varnt.

  IF lt_variant IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE 'No variants found for RKAEP000.' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  " Process each variant
  LOOP AT lt_variant INTO ls_variant.
    CLEAR: lt_list, lt_text, lv_fullpath.
    lv_count += 1.

    " Build file path
    lv_fullpath = p_path && '\' && ls_variant-name && '.CSV'.

    " Submit RKAEP000 with the variant, export list to memory
    SUBMIT rkaep000
      USING SELECTION-SET ls_variant-name
      EXPORTING LIST TO MEMORY
      AND RETURN.

    " Get list from memory
    CALL FUNCTION 'LIST_FROM_MEMORY'
      TABLES
        listobject = lt_list
      EXCEPTIONS
        not_found = 1
        OTHERS     = 2.

    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      WRITE: / 'Could not get list for variant:', ls_variant-name.
      CONTINUE.
    ENDIF.

    " Convert list to ASCII format
    CALL FUNCTION 'LIST_TO_ASCI'
      TABLES
        listobject = lt_list
        listasci   = lt_text
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS     = 1.

    " Download file to local system
    CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_DOWNLOAD'
      EXPORTING
        filename     = lv_fullpath
        filetype     = 'ASC'
        codepage     = '4110'
      TABLES
        data_tab     = lt_text
      EXCEPTIONS
        OTHERS       = 1.

    WRITE: / 'Saved variant', ls_variant-name, 'to', lv_fullpath.

  ENDLOOP.

Regards

Pankaj

entry.title: How to export data to excel by code?
entry.content:
Hello everyone, I'm developer but I am having a problem with my code that is I want to export data to excel without using OLE but I want to export data in external format when using CALL FUNCTION CONVERT DATE TO INTERNAL when the data displayed on ALV is DD/MM/YYYY then I want when exporting data to excel it will display as YYYYMMDD. I need help.
ABAP Development  SAP BTP ABAP environment 

FORM download_data_to_excel USING p_table TYPE tabname.
  DATA lt_fields    TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF dfies.
  DATA lt_data      TYPE REF TO data.
  DATA lv_localpath TYPE string.
  DATA lv_msg       TYPE string.
  DATA lo_alv       TYPE REF TO cl_salv_table.
  DATA lv_xstring   TYPE xstring.
  DATA lv_bytecount TYPE i.
  DATA lt_solix     TYPE solix_tab.

  FIELD-SYMBOLS <lt_table> TYPE STANDARD TABLE.

  " TODO: variable is never used (ABAP cleaner)
  DATA ls_field TYPE dfies.

  " Lấy metadata bảng
  CALL FUNCTION 'DDIF_FIELDINFO_GET'
    EXPORTING  tabname   = p_table
               langu     = sy-langu
    TABLES     dfies_tab = lt_fields
    EXCEPTIONS not_found = 1
               OTHERS    = 2.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR lt_fields IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE ':cross_mark: Không thể lấy metadata của bảng.' TYPE 'E'.
  ENDIF.

  " Tạo bảng động chứa dữ liệu
  CREATE DATA lt_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF (p_table).
  ASSIGN lt_data->* TO <lt_table>.

  " Lấy toàn bộ dữ liệu từ bảng
  SELECT * FROM (p_table) INTO TABLE @<lt_table>.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR lines( <lt_table> ) = 0.
    MESSAGE ':information: Bảng không có dữ liệu để xuất.' TYPE 'I'.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

  " Hộp thoại chọn nơi lưu file Excel
  cl_gui_frontend_services=>file_save_dialog( EXPORTING  default_extension   = 'xlsx'
                                                         default_file_name   = |Data_{ p_table }_{ sy-datum }_{ sy-uzeit }.xlsx|
                                                         initial_directory   = 'C:\TEMP\'
                                                         prompt_on_overwrite = 'X'
                                              CHANGING   filename            = lv_localpath
                                                         path                = lv_msg
                                                         fullpath            = lv_localpath
                                              EXCEPTIONS cntl_error          = 1
                                                         error_no_gui        = 2
                                                         OTHERS              = 3 ).
  IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR lv_localpath IS INITIAL.
    MESSAGE ':information: Bạn chưa chọn nơi lưu.' TYPE 'I'.
    RETURN.
  ENDIF.

  " Tạo ALV từ dữ liệu
  TRY.
      cl_salv_table=>factory( IMPORTING r_salv_table = lo_alv
                              CHANGING  t_table      = <lt_table> ).

      " Đặt tiêu đề cột đơn giản
      DATA(lo_columns) = lo_alv->get_columns( ).
      lo_columns->set_optimize( abap_true ).

      " Chuyển đổi sang XLSX
      lv_xstring = lo_alv->to_xml( xml_type = if_salv_bs_xml=>c_type_xlsx ).

      " Chuyển XSTRING sang SOLIX
      CALL FUNCTION 'SCMS_XSTRING_TO_BINARY'
        EXPORTING buffer        = lv_xstring
        IMPORTING output_length = lv_bytecount
        TABLES    binary_tab    = lt_solix.

      " Tải file xuống
      cl_gui_frontend_services=>gui_download( EXPORTING  bin_filesize            = lv_bytecount
                                                         filename                = lv_localpath
                                                         filetype                = 'BIN'
                                              CHANGING   data_tab                = lt_solix
                                              EXCEPTIONS file_write_error        = 1
                                                         no_batch                = 2
                                                         gui_refuse_filetransfer = 3
                                                         invalid_type            = 4
                                                         no_authority            = 5
                                                         unknown_error           = 6
                                                         header_not_allowed      = 7
                                                         separator_not_allowed   = 8
                                                         filesize_not_allowed    = 9
                                                         header_too_long         = 10
                                                         dp_error_create         = 11
                                                         dp_error_send           = 12
                                                         dp_error_write          = 13
                                                         unknown_dp_error        = 14
                                                         access_denied           = 15
                                                         dp_out_of_memory        = 16
                                                         disk_full               = 17
                                                         dp_timeout              = 18
                                                         file_not_found          = 19
                                                         dataprovider_exception  = 20
                                                         control_flush_error     = 21
                                                         not_supported_by_gui    = 22
                                                         error_no_gui            = 23
                                                         OTHERS                  = 24 ).
      IF sy-subrc <> 0.
        MESSAGE ID sy-msgid TYPE sy-msgty NUMBER sy-msgno
                WITH sy-msgv1 sy-msgv2 sy-msgv3 sy-msgv4.
      ELSE.
        MESSAGE |:white_heavy_check_mark: Xuất dữ liệu thành công. Tổng cộng { lines( <lt_table> ) } dòng.| TYPE 'S'.
      ENDIF.

    CATCH cx_root INTO DATA(lx_error).
      MESSAGE |:cross_mark: Lỗi khi xuất file Excel: { lx_error->get_text( ) }| TYPE 'E'.
  ENDTRY.
ENDFORM.

LOOP AT lt_fields INTO ls_field.
  ASSIGN COMPONENT ls_field-fieldname OF STRUCTURE <ls_row> TO <lv_value>.
  IF sy-subrc <> 0 OR <lv_value> IS INITIAL.
    CONTINUE.
  ENDIF.

  CALL METHOD OF lo_sheet 'Cells' = lo_cell
    EXPORTING #1 = lv_row
              #2 = lv_col.

  IF ls_field-datatype = 'DATS'.
    CALL FUNCTION convert DATE TO INTERNAL
      EXPORTING date_external            = <lv_value>
                accept_initial_date      = abap_on
      importing
                date_internal            = lv_data
      exceptions
                date_external_is_invalid = 1
                others                   = 2.
    IF sy-subrc <> 0.
      " Implement suitable error handling here
    ENDIF.
    SET PROPERTY OF lo_cell 'Value' = lv_data.
  ELSEIF ls_field-datatype = 'TIMS'.

    WRITE <lv_value> TO lv_data2.
    REPLACE ALL OCCURRENCES OF ':' IN lv_data2 WITH ' '.
    SET PROPERTY OF lo_cell 'Value' = lv_data2.
  ELSE.

    SET PROPERTY OF lo_cell 'Value' = <lv_value>. " 20250610
    SET PROPERTY OF lo cell 'NumberFormat' = '@'.
  ENDIF.
ENDLOOP.

entry.title: EXIT_/SAPAPO/SAPLBOP_040 Business event is not getting flipped
entry.content:
Hi,

 I m trying to flip the Business event for a Order from 'A' to a another business event 'ZA' based on certain condition through /SAPAPO/BOP but business event is  not updated to /sapapo/atpparam table . So please  help out whether do i need to change any other field in the CT_REQ .

SCM APO Integration (CIF)  SCM APO Global ATP

entry.title: How to send a high priority mail as in outlook from ABAP
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to send  a high priority mail from ABAP OData. I am currently using cl_bcs class. I have tried setting the priority in SODOCCHGI1 as 1. But still i am not able to receive mail with high importance flag.

entry.title: Entry of deleted function group still appears in SE80 and Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello,

I have deleted a function group but its name is still shown in Eclipse (it's the same in SE80):

If I delete it again, it says it's deleted. If I double click the name, it says it's deleted.

What can I do to remove it from the screen?

Sandra

System: ABAP 7.58 SP 1

entry.title: How to move data from TEVEN to RT table in Payroll?
entry.content:
hello Expert , I am abap developer

I'm working on Payroll schema, and I want to include time data from TEVEN table (e.g. attendance or absence hours) into the RT (Results Table).

I know TEVEN is processed in Time Evaluation (TM00), but is there a way to transfer certain TEVEN data (like total hours) into Payroll RT using schema logic or a custom operation?

entry.title: Is it possible to register the same project ID multiple times?
entry.content:
We would like to create multiple projects with the same project ID. Is this feasible?

Below are the business requirements:

My customer consists of two group companies: Company A and Company B.
Their respective roles are as follows:

  • Company A (parent company): Receives orders from clients and outsources manufacturing to its subsidiary, Company B.

  • Company B (subsidiary): Manufactures products based on requests from Company A.

In this setup, both Company A and Company B use the same project ID to maintain consistency across projects.

Since Company A and Company B are separate legal entities, they operate under different company codes and controlling areas.
Therefore, it is necessary to register separate projects within each entity.

Is there a way to fulfill the above requirements?
It would be ideal if we could define separate number ranges by company code or controlling area.

I would greatly appreciate expert guidance on this matter.

entry.title: What is parameter MASS_PROCESSING of IDoc Inbound Function Modules?
entry.content:
Out of curiosity, what is the parameter MASS_PROCESSING of IDoc Inbound Function Modules?

Thanks.

Sandra

entry.title: SAP Fiori ALP - Visual Filter does not work when many records
entry.content:
Hi Community!

I am having a problem with Fiori Analytical List Page (ALP).

I created a project to display some charts based on the data we have (Dumps), it starts working properly with a small amount of data, however when the data is more realistic it starts failing. For example: Less than 200 records. Everything is working fine!



More than 200 records: Visual Filters does not load any more and above 700 records approx the main chart does not load anymore.



I am learning about this technology, so I am not sure what the problem is

I was thinking in maybe limit these charts to the top N values

Visual Filter: Top 3-5 or Last 5 records.
Bar Chart: Top 20 records

But not sure if that will help me to solve it and also I don't know if is possible.

Thanks!

entry.title: BUDGET EXCEEDED - EMAIL CUSTOMIZATION
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

When the budget is exceeded, one email should be sent. this is the email and i want to change it using dynamic values. ( Please contact Oder &owner& (Name)).

 

Can any one guide me how to use se61 to update the email or any other road.

Thanks !
